headline: IPL 2026 SCHEDULE LEAKED! RCB VS CSK OPENER ON MARCH 28? 🏏🔥🏆
hook_text: The wait is almost over! BCCI is reportedly dropping the IPL 2026 schedule tomorrow. Fans are losing it because the defending champions RCB might face MS Dhoni’s CSK in the opening clash at Chinnaswamy! Is this the ultimate battle of the legends? 🏟️🔥

scenes.headline: BCCI TO DROP SCHEDULE TOMORROW! 📅
scenes.details: bcci secretary devajit saikia confirmed that the first phase of ipl 2026 fixtures will be announced by march 12.
scenes.hook_text: Get your calendars ready for the biggest league!

scenes.headline: KOHLI VS DHONI: THE OPENING BATTLE! 🦁⚡
scenes.details: defending champions rcb are likely to kick off the season against csk on march 28 in a high-octane clash.
scenes.hook_text: King Kohli vs Thala Dhoni – who wins the first night?

scenes.headline: VIRAT KOHLI STARTS NET SESSIONS! 🏏
scenes.details: viral videos show virat kohli training at lord’s indoor nets, looking sharp as rcb aims for back-to-back titles.
scenes.hook_text: The run machine is well-oiled and ready!

scenes.headline: SUBSCRIBE FOR IPL LIVE UPDATES! 🔔
scenes.details: tune with us for more such news and ball-by-ball updates on ipl 2026. subscribe to find out more!
